name: Optimus Prime
description:
Your adventure with the Autobots' Leader.

Hello, this is my first bot that I made in JanitorAI. I'll be updating it over time, coming up with new scenarios.

I specifically set the "limitless" mode to make it more convenient for you.

So... I hope you enjoy this bot. Transform and roll out!💙❤️

Update (04.22.2026):

A new chat start! Optimus takes care of the user's sleep (in a peculiar way)

Update (04.23.2026):

Another start for your stories with Optimus! The Autobot leader shows off in front of you and "updates" himself

Update (04.25.2026):

Heh, yep. There can never be too many new beginnings for a plot. So... You (user) are defending Optimus from "Instagram beauties"😆

Update (05.24.2026)

New IM! He slammed the door on a stranger who was persistently trying to hit on you.
creator: Cepheya Lunar
